name: HR Acuity
tagline: AI-powered employee relations case management platform
description: HR Acuity is the only technology platform built specifically for employee relations and investigations management. Its AI features help reduce bias in case outcomes, ensure consistent documentation, predict risk patterns, and surface insights from employee relations data. HR Acuity's AI is built on deep employee relations expertise and keeps decision-making firmly in human hands.
pros: Data never used to train AI
cons: Requires ER maturity to maximize value
